evidence_summary: Tour guide shares ghost stories and chilling experiences from Port Arthur Historic Site The Port Arthur Historic Site ghost tour manager shares some chilling experiences visitors have reported. It's known as one of Australia's most haunted places, and every year 20,000 people brave a ghost tour at the Port Arthur Historic Site. Guiding manager Jake Bradshaw shares some stories with ABC Tasmania Afternoons presenter Joel Rheinberger, including the one that gets the biggest reaction from visitors. evidence_summary: Murder on the Tasman Express: A radio play from ABC Radio Hobart. Episode 3 Can ghosts help our trapped travellers unmask the killer hiding right in front of them? The lights have gone out, the rain is coming down and the travellers in the Tasman Express are getting spooked. Are they truly alone? Can voices of radio broadcasts past shed light on who the murderer is? ABC Radio Tasmania Evenings with Helen Shield presents a six-part whodunnit murder mystery radio play, Murder on the Tasman Express. You can catch up on episode one and episode two on the Tasmania Evenings program page. Credits: Carriage announcements – Rachel Edwards Theon – loves fishing and takes his tackle box everywhere – Leon Compton Noel – not all heroes wear capes, but Noel does.

evidence_summary: Saturdays Have you heard stories of the ghosts that are said to haunt Tasmania’s East Coast?
